vocab.meaning: người thích chụp ảnh mọi lúc mọi nơi
vocab.example: I'm a bit of a snap-happy person, especially when I'm traveling; I want to document every single detail.

vocab.meaning: những bức ảnh chụp tự nhiên (không diễn)
vocab.example: I far prefer taking candid shots of my friends laughing over staged portraits, as they feel more authentic.
I usually take photos of landscapes because I’m not very photogenic myself and prefer staying behind the lens.

vocab.meaning: trông rất tuyệt vời/sang trọng (trong ảnh)
vocab.example: I love doing fashion photography because my goal is to make the model look a million dollars.
I’m not a professional; I just use my phone to capture the moment whenever I see something heart-warming.

vocab.meaning: một chuyến ngược dòng ký ức (xem lại ảnh cũ)
vocab.example: I take lots of family photos so that years later, we can take a walk down memory lane together.

vocab.meaning: làm cho thứ gì đó trở nên sống động
vocab.example: Using a macro lens really brings tiny flowers to life in a way the naked eye can't see.

vocab.meaning: là tâm điểm của sự chú ý
vocab.example: I enjoy taking street photography where ordinary people are momentarily in the spotlight of my frame.

vocab.meaning: dừng lại một khung hình/khoảnh khắc
vocab.example: Sports photography is challenging because you have to freeze-frame the action at exactly the right second.

vocab.word: paint someone in a good light
vocab.meaning: làm cho ai đó hiện lên một cách tốt đẹp/đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: As a portrait photographer, my job is to use lighting to paint my subjects in a good light.
